items.title: Dozens hurt in Bologna protests after man dies while being restrained by police
items.dek: Thousands of people took to the streets demanding justice for a Moroccan-born man who died on Sunday.
items.body: Thousands of people took to the streets demanding justice for a Moroccan-born man who died on Sunday.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Kelly Clarkson fears she has ‘explosive diarrhea’ parasite

items.title: Row escalates in Ukraine over army chief's future
items.dek: Protesters are demanding Oleksandr Syrskyi be removed and former defence minister Mykhailo Fedorov reinstated by Friday.
items.body: Protesters are demanding Oleksandr Syrskyi be removed and former defence minister Mykhailo Fedorov reinstated by Friday.
items.author: IriLine Desk
